twitter_thread: 85% of ai-powered desktop apps are just web apps in a wrapper. Only 15% have features like Gemini Pro's 30% productivity boost.
Gemini Pro's ai assistant can automate 20 common tasks, freeing up 2 hours of work per day.
To build a useful ai-powered desktop app, analyze 100 user workflows like Roblox execution environments to find bottlenecks.
Don't waste 6 months building an app that just mirrors web functionality. Focus on offline capabilities like data processing.
A 50-template library can cut down dev time by 75% when building complex ai-powered desktop apps.
What's the most useful ai-powered desktop app you've used, and how has it changed your workflow?
Have you tried building an ai-powered desktop app? What were some of the challenges you faced? #aiproductivity #desktopapps
